PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>

PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?pm ?pmLabel WHERE {
  ?pm wdt:P39 wd:Q796897 .
  ?pm p:P39 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P39 wd:Q796897 .
  ?statement pq:P580 ?start .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?statement pq:P582 ?end .
  }
  FILTER(LANG(?pmLabel) = "en")
  FILTER(xsd:dateTime(?start) <= "2018-12-31T23:59:59Z" ^^ xsd:dateTime)
  FILTER(! BOUND(?end) || xsd:dateTime(?end) >= "2018-01-01T00:00:00Z" ^^ xsd:dateTime)
  SERVICE <https://qlever.cs.uni-freiburg.de/api/wikidata> {
    ?pm rdfs:label ?pmLabel
  }
}
ORDER BY DESC(xsd:dateTime(?start))
LIMIT 1
